system.description:
Amnesia (Persistent). Your character is missing a portion of her memory. An entire period of her life is just gone. This causes massive difficulties with friends and loved ones.

Possible Sources: Physical or psychological trauma, the Dominate Discipline.

Resolution: You regain your memory and learn the truth. Depending on the circumstances, this may constitute a breaking point at a level determined by the Storyteller.

Beat: Something problematic arises, such as a forgotten arrest warrant or old enemy.
